name: Aurochs' Might Tattoo (Lesser)
description:
The aurochs depicted by this tattoo is a powerful symbol of strength and resilience. When upgraded, the tattoo expands to depict an increasingly imposing herd of aurochs.

Activate—Aurochs Charge 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You Stride twice and make a melee Strike against a creature within your reach at any point during your movement. If the Strike hits and deals damage, the target attempts a save to avoid being toppled by the impact.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is until the beginning of its next turn.

Failure The target is knocked .

Critical Failure As failure, but the target also takes ] damage.
